more.title: Heavy rains kill over 130 in Zimbabwe
more.description: Xinhua At least 132 people have been killed and 72 others injured as a result of heavy rains across Zimbabwe since the start of the rainy season last October, the country’s Department of Civil Protection (DCP) said Wednesday. In its latest situation report, the DCP said the heavy rains have damaged infrastructure at 237 schools, [...] The post Heavy rains kill over 130 in Zimbabwe appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
